commands.summary: [AC-1] Security+ (SY0-701) is present as the second additional certification track in src/content/certifications.json with order 3 and idPrefix secplus.
[AC-1] src/content/security-plus/ contains domains, objectives, lessons, questions, flashcards, and PBQs.
[AC-1] 2026-06-22 validation: node scripts/validate-content.mjs --strict-coverage reports security-plus: 5 domains, 199 questions, 45 flashcards, 9 PBQs, 41 lessons; 28/28 objectives complete.
[AC-1] 2026-06-22 current-target check: CompTIA's Security+ certification page still lists Security+ V7 / SY0-701 as the live exam series; Security+ V8 is currently a draft under development.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
